Terms, privacy, and security

Terms and conditions

By using the Diocese of Calbayog online portal, you agree to use this system lawfully, keep your login credentials private, and provide accurate information when registering or booking services.

Privacy policy

Parish, diocesan, and other officials may use submitted data to carry out ministry, pastoral care, and records management in line with the practices of the Diocese, subject to applicable law. Misuse, impersonation, or attempts to access data you are not authorized to view is prohibited.

Security policy

Keep passwords private, sign out on shared devices, and report suspicious account activity to the parish or diocesan office. The portal may restrict or review access when account misuse is suspected.

The Diocese may update these terms. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms, where required by law or policy.
